Show / Hide Table of Contents

Interface IFlyOutPanel

Represents a fly-out panel that can be attached to a control and displayed dynamically.

The IFlyOutPanel interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Inherited Members
IDisposable.IsDisposed
ISynchronizeInvoke.BeginInvoke(Delegate, object[])
ISynchronizeInvoke.EndInvoke(IAsyncResult)
ISynchronizeInvoke.Invoke(Delegate, object[])
ISynchronizeInvoke.InvokeRequired
IWin32Window.Handle
IComponent.Site
IComponent.Disposed
IDisposable.Dispose()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.FlyOutPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IFlyOutPanel : IDisposable, ISynchronizeInvoke, IWin32Window, IComponent, IDisposable
Remarks

Instances of IFlyOutPanel are created using the CreatePanel(Control) or CreatePanel(Control, FlyOutPanelOptions) method.

The lifetime of an IFlyOutPanel instance is managed by the consumer. The consumer is responsible for disposing the panel when it is no longer needed.

Examples

The following example demonstrates how to create and display a fly-out panel:

// Create a new fly-out panel (without initial content)
IFlyOutPanel flyOutPanel = flyOutPanelFactory.CreatePanel(null);

// Create and assign content
Control content = new CustomControl();
content.Size = new Size(250, 100);
flyOutPanel.Content = content;

// Attach the panel to a host control
flyOutPanel.AttachTo(flyOutHost);

// Display the panel
flyOutPanel.ShowPanel();

Properties

AnchorStyle

Gets or sets how the panel is positioned relative to its host.

Declaration
AnchorStyles AnchorStyle { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
AnchorStyles

Content

Gets or sets the content displayed inside the fly-out panel.

Declaration
Control Content { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Control

DisposeContent

Gets or sets whether the content is disposed when the panel is closed.

Declaration
bool DisposeContent { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

DisposeContentOnChange

Gets or sets whether the content is disposed when replaced.

Declaration
bool DisposeContentOnChange { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

EnableIndent

Gets or sets whether indentation is enabled.

Declaration
bool EnableIndent { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

Host

Gets the host control to which the panel is attached.

Declaration
Control Host { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Control

IsAttached

Gets a value indicating whether the panel is currently attached to a host control.

Declaration
bool IsAttached { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

IsShowing

Gets a value indicating whether the panel is currently visible.

Declaration
bool IsShowing { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

Location

Gets the current location of the panel.

Declaration
Point Location { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Point

MaximumSize

Gets the maximum allowed size of the panel.

Declaration
Size MaximumSize { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Size

MinimumSize

Gets the minimum allowed size of the panel.

Declaration
Size MinimumSize { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Size

ResizeMode

Gets or sets how the panel responds to resize operations.

Declaration
ResizeMode ResizeMode { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ResizeMode

Size

Gets the current size of the panel.

Declaration
Size Size { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Size

Methods

AttachTo(Control)

Attaches the panel to the specified control.

Declaration
void AttachTo(Control owner)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control owner

The host control.
Remarks

Does nothing if the panel is already attached or if Content is null.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown if owner is null.

Detach()

Detaches the panel from its host control.

Declaration
void Detach()

HidePanel()

Hides the panel if it is currently visible.

Declaration
void HidePanel()
Remarks

Does nothing if the panel is not visible.

IndentPanel(int, int)

Moves the panel by the specified offset.

Declaration
void IndentPanel(int deltaX, int deltaY)
Parameters
Type Name Description
int deltaX

Horizontal offset. The amount to move the panel horizontally towards right or left.
int deltaY

Vertical offset. The amount to move the panel vertically towards top or bottom.
Remarks

Does nothing if the panel is not attached or if EnableIndent is false.

ResizePanel(int, int)

Resizes the panel by the specified amounts.

Declaration
void ResizePanel(int deltaW, int deltaH)
Parameters
Type Name Description
int deltaW

Width adjustment. The amount to increase or decrease the width of the panel.
int deltaH

Height adjustment. The amount to increase or decrease the height of the panel.
Remarks

Does nothing if the panel is not attached or if ResizeMode is None.

ShowPanel()

Displays the panel at its current location.

Declaration
void ShowPanel()
Remarks

Does nothing if the panel is not attached or already visible.

ShowPanel(Point)

Displays the panel at the specified location.

Declaration
Point? ShowPanel(Point location)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Point location

The desired location.
Returns
Type Description
Point?

The actual location used, or null if the panel could not be shown.
Remarks

Returns null if:

  • The panel is not attached.
  • The panel is already visible.
  • The specified location is invalid.
